description: This file defines a configuration setup for a web backend application, encapsulating environment variable loading into a dataclass called Settings and a function get_settings to retrieve and validate environment-based configuration values.

classes.name: Settings
classes.description: A dataclass representing application settings loaded from environment variables, including JWT configuration, database URL, and CORS origins.

methods.name: Settings get_settings()
methods.description: Loads, validates, and returns application configuration settings from environment variables, raising exceptions for invalid or missing required values.
